violations.description: Food supplies. — --Food item obtained from unapproved source. Observed home canned pickled eggs, sweet onions and spicy onion on the shelf by the bar. Also, there was an open pickled egg jar in bar cooler.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of food contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Observed hamburger patties in the closed container. The lid of the container had duct tape on it. This is not a smooth surface.

Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided. No test strips for the dish washing machine. Chlorine test strips are needed.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. -Observed items in refrigerator that were not date marked.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
